data.title: Freight Technologies announces 1-for-4 reverse stock split; shares down
data.description:
• Freight Technologies (NASDAQ:FRGT) approved a one-for-four reverse share splits of its ordinary shares.
  • The ordinary shares will begin trading on a split adjusted basis on May 27, 2025.
  • The number of outstanding ordinary shares will be reduced from 9.15M to 2.29M.
  • The reverse split will not affect the number of total authorized ordinary shares.
  • FRGT shares down over 12% premarket on Thursday. 
  • Source: Press release

data.title: BP seeks buyers for Castrol lubricants unit to reach $20B divestment goal - Reuters
data.description:
BP (NYSE:BP) has started a sale process for its Castrol lubricants business and has hired Goldman Sachs to help it sell the unit, Reuters reported Thursday, marking a key step in the company's divestment plan to boost its share price.

BP (NYSE:BP) said in February that it was reviewing Castrol as part of a plan to raise $20B by 2027 through asset sales to lower its debt, and Reuters reported in March that Saudi Aramco was one of the parties weighing a potential bid for the unit.

A sale could raise $8B-$10B based on Castrol's projected core earnings of $1B for 2024, according to the report.

As part of its broader asset sale plan, BP (BP) also is looking to sell its Gelsenkirchen refinery and its mobility and convenience businesses in Austria, as well as the sale of a 50% stake in Lightsource bp, with bidders due to be short-listed in July.

Investors pressured BP (BP) to improve profitability after its shares have lost ~25% of their value in the last 12 months, more than double the drop suffered by rival Shell.

data.title: Metallis launches up to $1.35M private placement of units
data.description:
Minerals exploration company Metallis Resources (OTCQB:MTLFF) (TSXV:MTS:CA) announced on Thursday an up to $1.35M non-brokered private placement of up to 8.437M units priced at $0.16 per unit.

Each unit consists of one share and one non-transferable share purchase warrant. The warrant is exercisable into one share at a price of $0.26 per share for a 3-year period.

The proceeds will be used for field exploration work at the company's Greyhound and Kirkham Properties and for general corporate purposes.

data.title: Mobile Infrastructure uplists to Nasdaq
data.description:

  • Mobile Infrastructure’s stock will continue to trade on the NYSE American until the market close on Thursday, May 22, 2025.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Great-West Lifeco appoints CEO, Europe
data.description:
• Great-West Lifeco (TSX:GWO:CA) announced Lindsey Rix-Broom, currently chief executive officer of Canada Life U.K., has been appointed CEO, Europe, effective July 1, 2025.
  • Lindsey will continue to lead Canada Life U.K. until a successor is appointed.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Omnicell stock rises on prospects of improved profitability due to U.S.-China trade truce, buyback
data.description:
Omnicell (NASDAQ:OMCL) on Thursday raised its adjusted profit outlook for the second quarter and reported the authorization of a new $75 million stock repurchase program, sending shares up 4% in early trading. 

The company now expects adjusted EPS of $0.24 - $0.34 compared to $0.19 - $0.32 expected earlier.

The revised outlook reflects an expected easing of supply chain pressures and improved profitability following a reduction in tariff rates on Chinese imports, CEO Randall Lipps said.

“In parallel, reflecting what we view as our strong free cash flow, the company’s Board of Directors authorized a new stock repurchase program that should allow us to repurchase shares of our common stock opportunistically."

The middle to lower end of the updated Non-GAAP EBITDA and Non-GAAP earnings per share guidance ranges assume that the potential tariff rate on imports from China returns to 145% after the temporary 90-day reduction period.

"Assuming the tariff rate remains at 30% for the entirety of the 90-day period and then reverts to a rate that is below 145% beginning August 12, 2025... expect our actual results to be toward the middle to upper end of our updated guidance ranges for Non-GAAP EBITDA and Non-GAAP earnings per share."

Excluding the potential impact of other unexpected changes, including any changes to anticipated product revenue volumes during the year, each 25% reduction below a 145% tariff rate, beginning August 12, represents an expected ~$2 million reduction of the impact from tariffs on profitability in 2025, the company said.

data.title: Arqit Quantum reports 1H results
data.description: • Arqit Quantum press release (NASDAQ:ARQQ): 1H Loss before tax from continuing operations was $17.2 million

data.title: Trump Media makes Truth+ on-demand content available on Roku TV
data.description:
Trump Media and Technology (NASDAQ:DJT) said Thursday that on-demand TV streaming content for Truth+ is now accessible on connected TV apps for Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) TV sets.

The move by Trump Media complements its live TV offering, which it made available on the Roku app in March of this year.

The company also said all Truth+ programming will now be available on Samsung (OTCPK:SSNLF) connected TVs manufactured since 2022 as well as LG connected TVs, on top of iOS devices, Android devices, Apple TVs, Android TVs, Amazon Fire TVs, and on the Web.
